data.title: Torrent Capital Expands Cryptocurrency Portfolio With Additional SOL Purchase
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, Canadian firm Torrent Capital Ltd. has announced an expansion of its cryptocurrency portfolio. Since the initial announcement on January 6, 2025, regarding the creation of a cryptocurrency investment portfolio and the first purchase of SOL, the company has acquired an additional 4,955 SOL tokens.

As of February 10, 2025, Torrent Capital holds a total of 6,955 SOL...

data.title: Dell To Supply $5 Billion AI Servers To Musk's xAI
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Dell is set to provide AI servers worth $5 billion to Elon Musk's xAI. These servers will be equipped with Nvidia GB200 GPUs and are expected to be delivered within 2025. Following this announcement, Dell's stock price rose by 4%. Last December, xAI secured $6 billion in funding, with a portion allocated for GPU purchases.

data.title: Bitcoin (BTC) Landfill Saga Continues as Hard Drive Owner Considers Buying UK Garbage Dump: Report
data.description:

According to a new report by CNN, James Howells – a Welsh man who lost his Bitcoin stash worth a staggering $800 million […]

data.title: Decentralized Oracle Network Chainlink Tops All Ethereum-Based Coins in Terms of Development Activity: Santiment
data.description:
New data from the crypto analytics platform Santiment shows that the decentralized oracle network Chainlink (LINK) once again outpaces all other Ethereum (ETH)-based coins in terms of recent development activity. According to Santiment, Chainlink saw 691.07 notable GitHub events in the past 30 days, making it the leading ERC-based project by development activity. The validity […]

data.title: Torrent Capital Expands Cryptocurrency Portfolio With Additional SOL Purchase
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, Canadian firm Torrent Capital Ltd. has announced an expansion of its cryptocurrency portfolio. Since the initial announcement on January 6, 2025, regarding the creation of a cryptocurrency investment portfolio and the first purchase of SOL, the company has acquired an additional 4,955 SOL tokens.

As of February 10, 2025, Torrent Capital holds a total of 6,955 SOL tokens. These tokens are currently staked and generating returns.

data.title: Canadian National Bank Takes Bearish Stance On Bitcoin
data.description: According to BlockBeats, the Canadian National Bank has recently expressed a bearish outlook on Bitcoin. On February 12, the bank filed documents with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) indicating its intention to exercise put options. This move involves selling over $1.3 million worth of holdings in the BlackRock iShares Bitcoin Trust ETF.
